CustomField.description: Hour (0-23, UTC) when work log entries are locked for the prior billing period. For 5pm EST, set to 22 (EST is UTC-5, so 17+5=22). Combined with InvoiceHourLockoutDayNumber__c to form the full cutoff. Null defaults to 22 (5pm EST).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Hour in UTC when lockout takes effect (e.g., 22 = 5pm EST). Null defaults to 22.
CustomField.label: Invoice Hour Lockout Time (UTC)
